cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Professional Boundaries
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Clara's relationship with Jack evolves from a transactional dynamic to one of emotional and physical vulnerability, marked by repeated boundary crossings and growing intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Clara initiates physical intimacy with Jack in a detached, routine manner.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Clara gives Jack a personal gift, kisses him, and invites him to her apartment, signaling emotional investment beyond her role.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: tension between her identity as a sex worker and her desire for authentic connection

cross_scene_arcs.title: Clara's Emotional Awakening
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Clara transitions from emotional detachment to self-doubt, curiosity, and ultimately declaration of love, revealing her internal struggle to distinguish performance from genuine feeling.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Clara questions whether her emotional expressions are real or merely part of her role.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Clara declares her love for Jack and commits to running away with him.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Jack sees her as a person or a fantasy, and if their relationship can survive outside the context of secrecy

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mutual Vulnerability and Intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Clara and Jack develop a reciprocal, though uneven, emotional and physical intimacy that moves beyond the brothel into private and public spaces, marked by care, naming, and shared moments.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Clara notices Jack’s injury and offers help, stepping outside professional boundaries.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Clara undresses in front of Jack at the lake, seeking connection, but he withdraws, leaving the moment unfulfilled.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jack's emotional availability and willingness to reciprocate Clara's vulnerability

cross_scene_arcs.title: Revelation of Hidden Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Clara's concealed life—marked by a firearm and secret meetings—emerges, challenging Jack's understanding of her and introducing external threats to their relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jack discovers a Beretta in Clara's drawer, revealing a hidden, possibly dangerous dimension to her life.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Clara is seen in a clandestine meeting with an unknown man, then disappears, suggesting deeper allegiances or obligations.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the true nature of Clara's affiliations and whether she is using or protecting Jack

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Isolation and Lethal Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack transitions from a moment of quiet intimacy to a fugitive operative, methodically shedding identity, eliminating threats, and maintaining lethal readiness while evading capture.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally guarded but physically close to Ingrid
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fugitive who spares a moral witness but remains on the run
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jack's long-term survival and moral standing remain uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion and Ambiguity of Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack assumes the alias Edward Clarke, receives new documents and instructions, and maintains operational cover while surveillance and scrutiny challenge his anonymity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: in possession of a handgun and engaged in lethal violence
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: operational under a false identity, preparing for an unknown mission
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the alias has not been fully tested, and his cover is partially compromised

cross_scene_arcs.title: Jack and Ingrid: From Intimacy to Elimination
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack shares a moment of silent intimacy with Ingrid, only to later kill her as a witness, marking a cold shift from lover to executioner.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ingrid shifts from lover to victim
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jack shows no visible remorse, leaving emotional cost unexplored

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Father Benedetto: Scrutiny to Recognition
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Father Benedetto challenges Jack's anonymity, creating tension, but later affirms a bond by accepting Jack's letter, leading Jack to spare him in a moment of moral restraint.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: cover identity partially compromised by priest's knowledge
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Father Benedetto declares Jack a friend, influencing Jack's decision to retreat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the depth and origin of Benedetto's understanding of Jack remains unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moments of Vulnerability Amid Rigor
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jack experiences fleeting openness in nature and confusion after an affectionate farewell, revealing rare emotional cracks beneath his controlled exterior.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: guarded demeanor softens in response to natural beauty
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: left emotionally confused by Mathilde's intimate gesture and cryptic words
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jack does not process these moments, leaving their impact unresolved
